title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at 91Springboard

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at 91Springboard
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!
